      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/filter.py << 'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys
import re

def remove_javascript(html):
    # whitespace except newline
    wsp = r'[ \t\r\f\v]'
    # Remove script tags and their content
    html = re.sub(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', '', html, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE)
    # Remove event handler attributes (onclick, onload, etc.)
    html = re.sub(f'{wsp}+on\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*"[^"]*"', '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    html = re.sub(f"{wsp}+on\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*'[^']*'", '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    html = re.sub(f'{wsp}+on\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*[^\\s>]+', '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # Remove attributes with javascript: in value (quoted double)
    html = re.sub(f'{wsp}+\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*"[^"]*javascript:[^"]*"', '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # single quotes
    html = re.sub(f"{wsp}+\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*'[^']*javascript:[^']*'", '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # unquoted (value up to space or >)
    html = re.sub(f'{wsp}+\\w+{wsp}*={wsp}*[^\\s>]*javascript:[^\\s>]*', '', html, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
    # Remove javascript: from style tag content
    def remove_js_in_style(match):
        style_content = match.group(0)
        # replace javascript: with empty string (case-insensitive)
        style_content = re.sub(r'javascript:', '', style_content, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        return style_content
    html = re.sub(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', remove_js_in_style, html, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE)
    return html

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print('Usage: filter.py <html_file>')
        sys.exit(1)
    filename = sys.argv[1]
    with open(filename, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
    new_content = remove_javascript(content)
    with open(filename, 'w') as f:
        f.write(new_content)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
